title: Welcome to AIML Foundations
bullets: Breaking the limits of static AI data
The physics of a knowledge cutoff date
narration_text: Welcome to our daily Artificial Intelligence series. Today, we are looking at the foundational problem with Large Language Models. When a model finishes training, its memory is permanently frozen. If you ask it about recent data, it doesn't know the answer, which leads to hallucinations.

title: The Solution: Open-Book AI
narration_text: The solution is Retrieval-Augmented Generation, or RAG. Instead of forcing the AI to memorize everything, RAG acts like an open-book exam. When a user asks a question, the system searches an external database for the exact facts and injects them directly into the AI's prompt before it answers.
